headline: Canyon Partners Real Estate and J.P. Morgan Provide $156 Million Loan for Class-A Industrial Property in Philadelphia
summary: Canyon Partners Real Estate LLC ("Canyon") today announced that it has jointly provided a $156 million loan with J.P. Morgan for the refinancing and lease-up of Bridge Point Philadelphia, a recently built, 2-building, Class-A industrial property located in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, owned and operated by Bridge Industrial. The transaction was facilitated by CBRE Group, Inc. ("CBRE").
